remember: Describe the structure of stomata and their role in gas exchange
List the major products of photosynthesis and respiration in plants
understand: Explain the process of cellular respiration in plants, including glycolysis, Krebs' cycle, and electron transport chain
Describe the role of mitochondria in cellular respiration
apply: Compare and contrast the light-dependent and light-independent reactions of photosynthesis with the process of cellular respiration
Determine the energy yield from the breakdown of glucose in cellular respiration
analyze: Evaluate the importance of respiration in plant growth and development, and its relation to photosynthesis
Analyze the effects of environmental factors on respiration in plants

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to explain the process of respiration in plants, including aerobic and anaerobic respiration
Describe the structure and function of mitochondria in cellular respiration
board_exam_objectives: Explain the process of respiration in plants, including aerobic and anaerobic respiration
Describe the role of light and temperature in respiration in plants
Compare and contrast the light-dependent and light-independent reactions of photosynthesis with the process of cellular respiration
